AboutPage.hero_subtitle: BookHive is the modern, open-source way to track what you read, manage your shelves, and visualize your reading habits without sacrificing privacy.
AboutPage.feature_library_desc: Keep track of books you've read, want to read, or are currently reading with intuitive shelves.
AboutPage.feature_privacy_desc: Your data is yours. We use minimal tracking and robust security via Supabase authentication.
AboutPage.feature_speed_desc: Built with Next.js 15 and Server Components for instant page loads and smooth interactions.
AboutPage.mission_text_1: BookHive was born out of frustration with bloated, ad-filled book tracking sites. We believe managing your reading life should be simple, beautiful, and distraction-free.
AboutPage.mission_text_2: As an open-source project, BookHive allows the community to verify the code, contribute features, and own their data.

ContactPage.title: Contact Us
ContactPage.subtitle: We love hearing from our users. Choose the best channel for your needs.
ContactPage.community_text: Have ideas for new features? Want to discuss books?

TermsPage.title: Terms of Service
TermsPage.section_acceptance_text: By accessing or using BookHive, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you disagree with any part of the terms, you may not access the service.
TermsPage.section_accounts_text: When you create an account with us, you must provide us with information that is accurate and complete.
TermsPage.account_rule_1: You are responsible for safeguarding the password that you use to access the service.
TermsPage.account_rule_2: You may not use as a username the name of another person or entity that is not lawfully available for use.
TermsPage.section_content_text: Our service allows you to post, link, store, share and otherwise make available certain information (reading logs, reviews). You are responsible for the content that you post.
TermsPage.section_termination_text: We may terminate or suspend access to our service immediately, without prior notice or liability, for any reason whatsoever, including without limitation if you breach the Terms.
TermsPage.section_disclaimer_text: The service is provided on an 'AS IS' and 'AS AVAILABLE' basis. BookHive makes no warranties, expressed or implied, regarding the reliability or availability of the service.

PrivacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPage.overview_text: BookHive respects your privacy. We do not sell your personal data to third parties. This policy outlines what data we collect and how it is used.
PrivacyPage.collection_text: We collect several different types of information for various purposes to provide and improve our service to you.
PrivacyPage.data_library_desc: The books you add, your reading status and notes.
PrivacyPage.data_usage_desc: We may collect information on how the service is accessed (e.g., browser type, time spent on pages) for performance monitoring.
PrivacyPage.storage_text: Your data is securely stored using Supabase. Passwords are hashed and never visible to us.
PrivacyPage.cookies_text: We use cookies primarily for maintaining your authentication session. We do not use third-party tracking cookies for advertising.
PrivacyPage.rights_text: You have the right to access, update, or delete the information we have on you. You can perform most of these actions directly within your profile settings.
